title: The Invasion of the Giant Bug
description: The horror! A monster insect comes creeping into town and tries to take over.
altHero: a giant bug with multiple legs, three eyes, and sharp teeth climbs skyskrapers in a city at night
alt1: two men having dinner through a window
alt3: the bug peeking into the window from the outside
alt4: the man avoids the insect’s claw
